package rulefixtures

// scenario for unnecessary_slice_copy_for_readonly: `copy := append([]T(nil), original...)` when `copy` is only read, never mutated
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule692PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario692Positive(records []Rule692PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
